feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: OS upgrade SAP ECC Suite on HANA
entry.content:
Dear Support,

We are planning a technological renewal of our operating system infrastructure.


Our SAP system is SAP ECC on NW 7.4 SP16 with PERSON_NAME DB version 2.00.059.PHONE_NUMBER
We are planning an upgrade from RHEL 7.x to 9.x - with clustering of ASCS and ERS resources.
We also have two application servers (PAS and AAS) on different server.


Following this guide:

 https://access.redhat.com/articles/3569681#overview to realize ASCS/ERS cluster.

This is the question: based on above guide (paragraph 2.3) PAS and AAS are installed on separated servers besides of ASCS/ERS cluster servers, we ask you to confirm that we can install PAS and AAS on the same servers of ASCS/ERS cluster.Please we kindly request your feedback


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Blocking of Sales Order thru SP Transaction Notification
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Im about to block Sales Order thru SP Notification, I Create a simple code to check if the customer has Open Invoices in the AR Module and if it does, it will block the sales order for that particular order unless the AR Document of the previous transaction is closed here is my code.

IF(@object_type = '17') and (@transaction_type in ('A', 'U'))

BEGIN

IF Exists (SELECT T0.CardCode FROM OINV T0

WHERE T0.DocEntry = @List_of_cols_val_tab_del AND T0.[DocStatus] = 'O' AND T0.CANCELED='N' )

BEGIN

SET @error = 1001

SET @error_message = 'You have Pending AR invoice Open, Please Settle Customer Account. Thank you!'

End

End

Apparently the code block Sales Order for all Customers even they dont have AR Invoice Open Documents.

what you think is the problem? anyone can help me?

entry.title: gross weight net weight table name ?
entry.content:
Hello,

im 100% new to sap and i have been asked to make an report from SAP with our companies purchase orders numbers together with each material purchase qty + gross /net weight for each material on the purchase order.

I don't know if that's possible or how to do it ?

I can see that I have access to SE16 if that is where I should go ?

Im only a user and have no admin rights

Sorry if this is a dumb question.... but hopefully someone can help me 🙂

entry.title: SAP Security: Moving to SU24 approach from manual authorization maintenance
entry.content:
Hi All,

Need guidance on below question which is very critical from my project point of view

Currently, we are not using SU24 approach in our project, means we don’t add tcodes in menu tab in role and adding tcodes in S_TCODE and only required authorization objects are added in role manually.

Now, we are going to convert our system into S/4 HANA and apart from this our client also want to convert roles into SU24 approach.

Thus, I wanted to know

  1. What activities need to be performed from SU25 and SU24 tcodes point of view
  2. Precautionary steps need to be performed
  3. Activities from role changes point of view

    Please share your suggestions or any documentations to perform these activities.

    Thanks

    Madhu K

entry.title: How do I extract data from SAP R/3 (4.7) ?
entry.content:
Hi,

As we are trying to migrate data from SAP R/3 (Version 4.7) to SAP S/4HANA Cloud (Public) through staging tables, could you please suggest possible ways to extract data from version 4.7? We need to extract all fields and tables (both specified and unspecified/classified and non-classified) from R/3.

We have attempted to extract data using transaction code SE16N, but we couldn't extract all tables, especially the classified ones. By using transaction code RSO2 for custom data source creation, we managed to extract some data, but not all fields from the tables. Kindly suggest possible ways to achieve complete data extraction, including any other transaction codes that may be useful.

Thank you.

entry.title: How to get ESLL-MWSKZ field given ESSR-LBLNI?
entry.content:
I'm trying to see what Tax Code (ESLL-MWSKZ) was used given a list of service entry sheet numbers (ESSR-LBLNI). 

SE16N table ESSR - I enter the Service Entry Sheet number into ESSR-LBNI and I get the associated ESSR-PACKNO. Then, SE16N table ESLL and enter the ESSR-PACKNO into ESLL-PACKNO and get an output... but ESLL-MWSKZ displayed is blank!

Manually looking I can clearly see that the Tax Code for the service entry posting not blank, and it's supposed to be ESLL-MWKZ... but viewing table ESLL, pulling it up the way described above, it's blank in the table output display!

Any help would be appreciated!

ESLL display from with entering PACKNO from ESSR into PACKNO for ESLL:

what the tax code actually is, when I display the entry sheet:

entry.title: New organization structure, cost centers and profit centers hierarchy change - ERP ECC 6
entry.content:
Hi,

I require urgent assistance. Client is restructuring and wants to create a new profit center and cost center hierarchies where the new centers are to be assigned to. 

The old profit and cost centers are to be locked and the new activated under this structure. Balances from 1 April (beg. of their financial year) to date are to be transferred in to these new centers, i.e. Balance Sheet, PnL, Opex, Revenues etc. 

Working on ERP ECC6 without the reorganization tool. 

Please assist as to how i go about this project as it starts this monday.

How do I replace the cost and profit center standard hierarchies so that upon mass creation of the centers, I can correctly allocate them to the new hierachies without viewing all the old groups etc.

How do I correctly migrate all the financial data to the new profit centers.

Any advice will help. Thanks!

entry.title: Can I run CON2 twice for the same period? (revaluation at actual price)
entry.content:
In case you should face errors during the first CON2 run, once errors are addressed can CON2 be executed again?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Not able to schedule Auto Database backup using DBACOCKPIT
entry.content:
how to schedule db backup job in db13?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Inconsistencies occurred in target system when we transported Storage location addresses
entry.content:
Hi Team, 

Inconsistencies occurred in target system when we transported Storage location addresses from source system.

In the source system: The number of addresses in the TWLAD table matches the number in the ADRC table.

In the target system: The number of addresses in the TWLAD table does not match the number in the ADRC table.

 

SAP Product: S4HANA ON PREMISE

Release: 2023

 

Thanks and Regards,

Manohar.

entry.title: SO and PR Link after WBS MRP
entry.content:
Hi Team

Good Evening

I am using WBS MRP transaction MD51 for MTO but after successfull run of MD51, there is no direct linke between Generated PR and Sales order which is associated with WBS. Same WBS is used in Sales Order Item. 

So, please help in this how link between SO item and PR line item after MRP exeuciton .

SAP NetWeaver Application Server for ABAP 

Ram Shanker

entry.title: SWITZERLAND LSV+ and BDD for the same company code - different identificators
entry.content:
Dear community,

We have a special case in Switzerland for direct debit incoming payments. 

We have a company code that has two LSV+ BDD IDs.

They use LSV+  (A key feature of LSV+ is that the direct debit payer always has a right of objection within 30 calendar days of the notification date by their financial institution).

LSV+ ID = TAAA1

and

They use BDD as well (To distinguish it clearly from the LSV+ service, participants in BDD are assigned a five-digit LSV identification (LSV ID) ending in the letter "X").

BDD ID = TAAAX

Some customers they gave authorization for LSV+ ID, the others for BDD.

According to the documentation attached to the SAP note 2324390 only one ID can be maintained in the OBY6 – company code settings.

Also, we have generate a different file for each of these two IDs.

Any idea what we can do to be able to work with two IDs?

Thank you,

Diana

entry.title: Hello Gurus,
entry.content: We are having multiple plants under a one company code. We are having a customer order for product Z in plant B. But due to some lack of capacity or due to other reasons we want to manufacture the same product in plant A. Procurement type of product Z is F ( externally procured ) in plant B and E ( internally manufactured ) in plant A. Once we put the demand (sales order) in plant B and after MRP run the Purchase Requestion will be generated for product Z. After MRP run of plant B at the same time I want to auto generate planned order of product Z in plant A and dependent requirement of BOM components in plant A. Is there any configuration or settings which needs to be done in master data, please let me know and suggest the ways to go.

entry.title: CDS view to get date of last change of characteristic
entry.content:
Hello,

Do you see it possible to do something like in following post but in CDS view?

https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-blog-posts/last-change-of-a-characteristics-value-from-material-batch/ba-p/13343375

The main challenge for me is that there are no direct/simple relation between tables.

eg. to join MCH1 and INOB I would have to do something like

INOB-OBJEK = MCH1-MATNR & MCH1-CHARG

or in case of INOB and CDHDR

INOB-CUOBJ & 'O' = CDHRD-OBJECTID

What I am trying to achieve is CDS view that would be used in BW extractor on ECC. Of course I can make FM based extractor, but even then it would be time consuming to get this date for every material/batch in the system. I have been going through standard CDS views in HANA, to get some inspiration, but did not find any that join change documents with actual objects. I am in a pickle.

Thank you!

Michal

entry.title: Tax indicator 0 is not defined for use with condition type ZNAV
entry.content:
Hi gurus

I have been requested to create some condition tables for tax determination in the creation of POs, I have created them, assigned them to an access sequence and assign this to the custom condition type ZNAV. This condition type has condition class D (taxes), calculation type B (fixed amount) and condition category D (tax). 

One of the condition tables is built with the fields "Destination country" and "Tax classification material", and when I'm trying to create new records in mek1, when I try to enter the value 0 in "tax classification material"  this error comes up: "Tax indicator 0 is not defined for use with condition type ZNAV" (it also happens for other values)

 

Does anyone knows what I am missing?

Thanks,

Álvaro

entry.title: Archiving AM_ASSET Accounting Values
entry.content:
Good moorning,

In the archiving of data of the object AM_ASSET the tax year prior to the closed year of the OAAQ tx takes a deadline, how can we archive until 2019 and not 2022?

 

Thanks.

entry.title: Annexed Purchase Orders consume only their net value
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We issue annexed purchase orders.   These POs create commitments in the Budget Control System with their net value only .   Is there a way to take into considerations the annexed value for the AVC check ?

Thanks

Yaacov

entry.title: In which table can I check the status of a condition contract?
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a query regarding condition contract management:

In which table can I check the status of a condition contract?

I have tried to check in tables "WCOCOH" and "WCOCOF" but I couldn't find any field related to show status.

Kindly let me know if there's any table where I input a condition contract number and I can get the status (i.e., New, Locked, Released, etc) of the document.

Thanks in advance.

 

#S4HANA #conditioncontractmanagement

entry.title: How to add a warning message when no value is obtained in condition type for taxes in purchase order
entry.content:
Hi gurus, 

I have been requested to add a condition type for tax determination when creating POs, this condition type has a sequence of 5 condition tables and I need to show a warning message when none of the tables have given a result (no condition has matched) and therefore the tax hasn't been calculated.

I have tried to search in spro in case it can be configured somewhere but haven't found anything, am I missing something? Does anyone knows a customer exit or BAdI to add this message after the validation?

Thanks, 

 

Álvaro.

entry.title: loan replacement material in customer repair process
entry.content:
hello gurus

I am relatively new to this process so I need your help.

I checked online but could not find the steps for this scenario.

1) our customer is sending material to be repaired

2) During repair time, we send him substitute material on loan

3) when the customer material is repaired, we send him back his own material and recuperate the material we gave him on loan.

The steps are clear and the repair process works well, what I am not sure about is how to send and later recuperate the material we give to the customer on loan?

meaning, how do I send it, what movement/special stock do I use, how to return it?
